keyTakeaway: Academic paper highlighting that autonomous AI creates emergent risks (like goal misalignment and reward hacking) that traditional governance frameworks cannot handle.
relevance: Rigorous academic backing for our pitch that standard cloud IAM is insufficient; true agentic AI requires a dedicated framework like Unity AI Gateway.

relevance: Massive external validation from BCG/Anthropic confirming Databricks' exact messaging: AI succeeds only when connected to governed enterprise data.
